history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, eye-level, slightly angled shot of a young East Asian woman with short, black bobbed hair and pale skin. She is wearing thin, rectangular, clear-framed glasses that rest on her nose. Her makeup is prominent, featuring light blue-grey contact lenses, subtle winged eyeliner, and a soft pink lip gloss. She is dressed in a black collared shirt with a ruched, button-down front. The background is softly blurred, showing a white wall with horizontal blinds on the right, and on the left, a fluffy grey furry throw with a single pink rosebud resting on it. A hint of a white bed with a furry trim is visible behind her. The lighting is soft and diffused, casting gentle shadows and highlighting her features. The overall mood is serene, elegant, and slightly mysterious. The color palette is dominated by muted tones of black, white, grey, and pale pink, with the subtle blue of her eyes providing a focal point. The image has a soft, almost dreamy aesthetic, with a shallow depth of field.
